case_title: CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. vs. ANTOINE, ARIA et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTOINE, ARIA
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-04-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206

9:00AM DEPT 6, JUDGE MITCHELL. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLAINTIFF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFENDANT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANTOINE, ARIA

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTOINE, ARIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTOINE, ARIA
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-11-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTOINE, ARIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTOINE, ARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 385 EDDY STREET, UNIT 404, SF, CA $246.06 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $246.06, LEASE FORFEITED, $246.06 WHICH REPRESENTS $104 AS BACK RENT FOR 2/95 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $142.06 FROM 3/1/95 TO 4/11/95 AND COSTS AS PER COST BILL.
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON APR-11-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANTOINE, ARIA
